rationale: Re-verified at 0f7e1a1a (base 45ae7577). go build ./... clean. go test -count=1 on all touched packages (cmd/mindspec, internal/panel, internal/config, internal/complete, plugins/mindspec) all green, no cache. Diff-stat vs base shows only the expected surface: cmd/mindspec/panel.go (+307) and panel_test.go (+727) grew substantially, consistent with the G2 security fix (escapeConfigValue/shellQuoteTarget/isValidPanelGateKey/sanitizeNonBeadDecision added for --gate and --target rendering); internal/panel/{create.go,create_test.go,panel_test.go}, internal/config/{config.go,config_test.go}; ms-panel.js plus its plugins/mindspec mirror and workflow_test.go; interfaces.md doc-sync. No unexpected code files touched. .beads/issues.jsonl regen confirmed: mindspec-r6hk.3 (round-1 G3 finding) is status=closed, closed_at 2026-07-09T22:42:44Z at HEAD. Remaining changes are spec.md/plan.md and tracked review-artifact JSONs, as expected.

findings.description: go test -count=1 ./cmd/mindspec ./internal/panel ./internal/config ./internal/complete ./plugins/mindspec all pass (ok, no failures); this reconfirms round-1's finding that the earlier go test ./... failures were parallel-contention/auth artifacts, not real regressions.

G2 security fix verified present: cmd/mindspec/panel.go adds rejectControlBytes("--gate", gate), isValidPanelGateKey membership check against config.PanelGateKeys, escapeConfigValue + shellQuoteTarget applied to target/gate before interpolation into rendered recovery commands, and sanitizeNonBeadDecision to strip poisoned bead/<empty> messaging for non-bead panels.
git show 0f7e1a1a:.beads/issues.jsonl confirms mindspec-r6hk.3 status="closed" (round-1 G3 finding fixed).

carried_forward: round-2 APPROVE carried to round-3: lens unaffected by the round-3 GitErr-escape fix (cmd/mindspec render only, zero internal diff)
